pricing_inputs.pricing_rationale: Needs work severity (1.6x multiplier) due to divorce attorney keyword absence and missing organic presence. High competitive intensity (+20%) based on strong competitors with similar ratings in SERP data. Setup fee increased for AEO implementation ($800) and technical audit requirements ($700). Monthly fee increased for ongoing AEO optimization (+$500) and competitive keyword targeting (+$550).

executive_summary: The Marks Law Firm shows strong GBP performance with 4.9 stars and 173 reviews but faces significant visibility gaps, absent from local pack for 'divorce attorney' in St. Louis, MO and missing from organic results entirely. While ranking 3rd for 'family law attorney', competitors with similar ratings are outperforming, indicating need for enhanced relevance signals and comprehensive AEO strategy.
